treasure.name: Strionic Resonator
treasure.description: A tuning-fork relic entrusted to Katarina Brunn by the Church of Avacyn.

treasure.name: Elbrus, the Binding Blade
treasure.description: A dangerous soul-hungry weapon hidden behind the guise of an innocent magic blade.

treasure.name: Blessed Silver Weapon
treasure.description: A silvered weapon forged by Marcus with help from someone who knows the rite.
